name: bolta.voice.learn_from_samples
description: Evolve a voice profile by learning from new content samples. V2-ready - continuous voice refinement.

account_id.description: Account UUID to analyze posts from

post_samples.description: Manually provided posts if not analyzing from account

max_posts.description: How many posts to analyze from account

days_back.description: How far back to look for posts

existing_voice_profile_id.description: Voice profile UUID to update (shows delta report)
